summary: Frontend-only testing of Puzzle Master Blast mobile game. All major features verified working: Home screen with 4 game modes, Jokerler modal with 4 jokers and purchase options, Temalar modal with 20 block themes and 12 backgrounds, Görevler modal with 8+ quests and progress bars, Game screen with power-ups bar and 3 block generation.

issues: useNativeDriver not supported (expected for Expo web)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features tested and working. AdMob functionality is MOCKED for web preview (works on native builds only). Block generation fix verified - 3 blocks are correctly generated.

home_screen.details: All 4 game modes visible (Klasik Mod, Zamanlı Mod, Çok Oyunculu, Turnuva), bottom navigation (Sıralama, Oyunlarım, Ödül, Temalar, Jokerler, Görevler), animated logo, user stats display, coin balance (100)

daily_reward_modal.details: Auto-appears on home load, shows 7-day calendar (Pzt-Paz), today's reward (50 XP, 100 coins), 'Ödülü Al!' claim button works, 'Toplam: 0' coin display

jokerler_modal.details: 4 jokers visible: Bomba (3x3 alanı temizle, 200 coin), Karıştır (Yeni bloklar al, 150 coin), Ekstra Süre (+30 saniye, 300 coin), Satır Temizle (Bir satırı temizle, 250 coin). Each has 'İzle' (watch ad) and coin purchase buttons. Coin balance displayed (100 Coin).

temalar_modal.details: Shows 'Bloklar (20)' and 'Arka Plan (12)' tabs. Block themes include: Klasik (active), Neon Mavi, Neon Pembe, Neon Yeşil, Neon Gökkuşağı, Okyanus, Gün Batımı, Orman, Sonbahar, Şeker Pembesi, Şeker Mavisi, Ateş, Buz, Galaksi Mor, Galaksi Mavi, Altın, Elmas, Aurora. Unlock icons show ad cost (1-5 ads).

gorevler_modal.details: Shows 'Günlük Görevler' title, '0/12 Görev Tamamlandı' progress, 100 Coin balance. 8 visible quests with progress bars: 500 Puan Topla (50 coin), 1000 Puan Topla (100 coin), 2500 Puan Topla (200 coin), 5 Satır Temizle (30 coin), 15 Satır Temizle (75 coin), 30 Satır Temizle (150 coin), 2x Combo Yap (40 coin), 3x Combo Yap (80 coin).

game_screen.details: Game screen loads with: 'Klasik Mod' title, Pause button, Sound toggle, Trophy button, Score display (star icon, 0), Level (LV.1), High Score (trophy icon, 0), XP bar (0/100), Power-ups bar with 3 buttons (Bomb with 1x, Shuffle with 1x, Extra Time with 0x), 8x8 game board, 3 block pieces at bottom (+5, +2, +9 points), Ad Space placeholder.

block_generation.details: Block generation fix verified - 3 blocks are correctly generated and displayed at bottom of game screen. Blocks show point values (+5, +2, +9).

power_ups_in_game.details: 3 power-up buttons visible in game: Bomb (flame icon, 1x count), Shuffle (shuffle icon, 1x count), Extra Time (time icon, 0x count - grayed out)

coin_balance_consistency.details: Coin balance (100) displayed consistently across home screen, Jokerler modal, Temalar modal, and Görevler modal

mocked_functionality.AdMob: Banner, interstitial, and rewarded ads are MOCKED for web preview - functional on native builds only
mocked_functionality.note: Production builds will have real AdMob integration. Web shows 'Ad Space' placeholder and simulates ad watching with 1.5s delay.

feature_verification.joker_purchase_with_coins: VERIFIED - Each joker shows coin cost (150-300) and purchase button
feature_verification.joker_purchase_with_ads: VERIFIED - Each joker shows 'İzle' (watch ad) button
feature_verification.themes_store: VERIFIED - 20 block themes and 12 backgrounds available
feature_verification.theme_unlock_with_ads: VERIFIED - Locked themes show play icon with ad count (1-5)
feature_verification.quests_system: VERIFIED - 8+ quests visible with progress bars and coin rewards
feature_verification.daily_rewards: VERIFIED - 7-day calendar with XP and coin rewards
feature_verification.block_generation_fix: VERIFIED - 3 blocks correctly generated in game screen
